Alongside the fellow [[kusak]] [[Scourge (kusak)|Scourge]], '''Razor''' guarded the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] in [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Nym's Base|base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lok/Legends|Lok]].<ref name="SWG:P3" />

==Behind the scenes==
Razor appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:P3" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Razor was added to the game as part of the so-called "[[W:c:swg:Nym's Theme Park|Nym's Theme Park]],"<ref name="SWG:P3" /> released with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 3 Notes: 8 October 03|Publish 3]]" on [[October 8]], 2003.<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 3: The Warren">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60890|text=Publish 3: The Warren}}</ref>
